workers.capability_summary: Grok 4.5 engineering Worker. Strong at bounded repo coding, tool loops, tests, and terminal work; weak at ungrounded facts, sole review, and style-led prose. Quirks: headless output may include ANSI-formatted CLI or plugin warnings before the final response; effort support for this model is narrower than broader CLI documentation.

Kimi K3 specialist Worker. Strong at long repo work, huge context, frontend and visual coding, and deep tool loops; weak at short routine jobs, fast chat, and ungrounded facts. Quirks: print mode auto-approves tools; structured streaming uses a vendor event shape rather than Divisi jsonl-events; text output may include transcript bullets and resume hints.
